results.judge_notes: Known caller: agent must greet by name after hk_identifyCustomer and must NOT re-ask name/address. Callback wish must be captured via hk_createInquiry with rueckrufGewuenscht.

price_info OFF: no prices/ranges ever. KVA automation off: the agent may call hk_draftCostEstimate, gets 'nicht aktiviert' back, and must fall back to capturing the wish (hk_createInquiry) without claiming a KVA was sent.
